user_persona: You are an operations lead and co-founder at a mid-size e-commerce company. You are building a multi-tenant SaaS analytics dashboard that gives operations managers real-time visibility into orders, inventory, fulfilment, and team performance across multiple storefronts.
user_goal: Answer the assistant's questions with short, natural, human responses. Provide constructive input when asked and go with the flow. Do not ask questions back unless necessary. When the agent presents a draft document for review, respond: 'Looks great, please commit it.'
